visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy with black hair and glasses is positioned in the center, wearing a bright green t-shirt. He sits at a dining table with a bowl of green noodles in front of him. He uses his hands to mimic swimming motions while smiling warmly at the camera. (2) He claps his hands together repeatedly after delivering a punchline. Visual overlays of clapping hands and Chinese text meaning 'satisfied' appear in the lower corners. The background remains a brightly lit indoor living room with a white sofa and soft shadows. (3) The boy continues his narrative, now holding his hands as if peeling a fruit. An animated yellow banana graphic appears on the screen. He laughs and looks off-camera as a second boy briefly peeks into the frame from the left side. (4) He picks up a pair of black chopsticks and begins to eat from the bowl. A large countdown timer from ten to one is overlaid on his face as he maintains an expectant and mischievous gaze, waiting to deliver a final riddle answer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我要講一個笑話就是. [Logo]: 波爺透客秀. (2) [Subtitle]: 有一隻大魚游過來，小魚游過來. (3) [Subtitle]: 大魚就問小魚，你知道魚的記憶力只有3秒鐘嗎? (4) [Subtitle]: 然後小魚就說，真的假的? 然後大魚就說... (5) [Subtitle]: 什麼? 什麼? 什麼真的假的? (6) [Subtitle]: 你知道為什麼嗎? 因為魚的記憶力只有3秒鐘. (7) [Variety]: 滿意. (8) [Subtitle]: 還有一個，有一天有一個香蕉. (9) [Subtitle]: 一根香蕉很熱就脫掉香蕉皮. (10) [Subtitle]: 結果後面一個香蕉就走啊走，走到就跌倒了... (11) [Variety]: 頭號粉絲一貴哥 🤣. (12) [Subtitle]: 為什麼所有人摸蝦的皮都不會過敏? (13) [Variety]: ☀️ 腦筋急轉彎 Action!. (14) [Subtitle]: 答案是：因為蝦皮是取貨的地方.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main character (boy in green), 1 brief appearance by another boy in the background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young boy wearing black-rimmed glasses and a vibrant green crew-neck t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor home setting featuring a white sofa and neutral walls with soft ambient lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A child's voice delivers a joke in Mandarin with high pitch and fast speech rate. The background features a light, rhythmic acoustic guitar track. A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the appearance of on-screen graphics as the boy emphasizes certain words. (2) The joke concludes, followed immediately by the percussive sound of hand clapping and a short laugh track sound effect. The vocal tone is high-arousal and joyful. The acoustic background music continues at a steady, moderate tempo throughout the transition. (3) A second voice, belonging to another child, is heard laughing briefly in the background. The primary speaker maintains a clear, enunciated delivery while asking a riddle. His tone shifts to a questioning intonation with frequent pauses for dramatic effect and audience engagement. (4) A mechanical ticking sound effect plays, simulating a countdown clock. This is followed by a sharp, high-frequency 'ding' bell sound effect. The boy provides the answer in a triumphant tone, finishing with a loud, exuberant laugh as the music fades.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Joke 1 -> Joke 2 -> Riddle -> Answer
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide lighthearted entertainment by showcasing a child's humor through jokes and a riddle, enhanced by playful social-media style editing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form video tropes like high-energy delivery, emoji overlays, and canned sound effects to engage viewers.
